title: UI fixes: reposition buttons/popups, restore 3D/2D toggles, remove bottom-left time

requirements.summary: Move the 'World Travel', 'Time Zone', and 'Global Control' buttons back to the upper-left area of the map/globe explorer UI
acceptanceCriteria: The World Travel, Time Zone, and Global Control buttons are visually positioned in the upper-left corner of the explorer page.
No other UI elements are repositioned or removed as a side effect.

file_operations.description: Modify the button group container (containing World Travel, Time Zone, and Global Control buttons) to use absolute positioning with top-left anchoring (e.g., top-4 left-4). Remove any right-side positioning classes currently applied to this button group.

requirements.summary: Open World Travel, Time Zone, and Global Control popups on the right side of the screen instead of the left
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'World Travel' opens its popup anchored to the right side of the viewport.
Clicking 'Time Zone' opens its popup anchored to the right side of the viewport.
Clicking 'Global Control' opens its popup anchored to the right side of the viewport.
Popups do not overlap the upper-left button group.

file_operations.description: Update the Dialog or Sheet components for TraveloguePanel, the timezone overlay controls panel, and WebsiteLayoutPanel to position their content containers on the right side of the viewport. Use classes like 'right-0' or 'inset-y-0 right-0' with appropriate width constraints (e.g., 'w-96' or 'max-w-md') to anchor popups to the right edge.

requirements.summary: Restore the 3D and 2D toggle buttons for switching between 3D globe and 2D map views
acceptanceCriteria: A 3D toggle button and a 2D toggle button are visible in the UI.
Clicking '3D' switches the view to the 3D interactive globe.
Clicking '2D' switches the view to the 2D map.
The active view mode is visually indicated on the toggle buttons.

file_operations.description: Add a view mode state (e.g., viewMode: '3D' | '2D') and conditionally render InteractiveGlobe when viewMode is '3D' or MapComponent when viewMode is '2D'. Add two toggle buttons labeled '3D' and '2D' in a prominent location (e.g., near the upper-left button group or as a separate floating control). Apply visual styling to indicate the active mode (e.g., highlighted background, bold text, or border). Wire button onClick handlers to update the viewMode state.

requirements.summary: Remove the local time display from the bottom-left area of the explorer UI
acceptanceCriteria: No time or clock element is rendered in the bottom-left corner of the explorer page.
The removal does not affect any other UI elements or layout.

file_operations.description: Locate and remove the time display element currently positioned in the bottom-left area (likely a div or span with absolute positioning classes like 'bottom-4 left-4' displaying local time or UTC offset). Delete the JSX element and any associated state or effect hooks that compute or format the time value.
